summary: The diff implements the four main requirements (REQ-37 through REQ-40) largely as specified. The backend adds user management with stable storage, role enforcement, and last-admin protection. The frontend adds the useAdminPanel hook, AdminPanel component, and conditional Admin tab. However, there are notable gaps: backend method names differ from the spec, the useActor.ts file was modified despite being a constraint, and a hallucinated utility file and migration module were added without being requested.

missing_requirements.requirement: Provide method getCurrentUserRole(principal) returning the role for a given principal
missing_requirements.reason: The backend implements 'getCallerUserRole()' which returns the role for the calling principal implicitly, but not a 'getCurrentUserRole(principal)' method that accepts an arbitrary principal as a parameter as specified.

missing_requirements.requirement: Provide method registerOrUpdateUser(principal, name, role) as specified
missing_requirements.reason: The backend method is named 'addOrUpdateUser' instead of 'registerOrUpdateUser' as specified in the requirement.

hallucinated_features.description: A backend/migration.mo module was added with a no-op migration function
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request does not request a migration module. This was not listed in any requirement.

hallucinated_features.description: A frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts utility file was added with URL parameter parsing, sessionStorage helpers, and hash-param clearing functions including a caffeineAdminToken secret parameter concept
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request does not mention URL parameter utilities, session storage helpers, or any admin token concept. This is entirely outside the scope of the four requirements.

hallucinated_features.description: The useActor.ts file was modified to include caffeineAdminToken secret parameter initialization via _initializeAccessControlWithSecret
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request explicitly lists frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts as a file that must NOT be modified. Additionally, the caffeineAdminToken concept was not requested.

hallucinated_features.description: AccessControl and MixinAuthorization modules are imported and used in backend/main.mo with a full access control system
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request specifies only simple role-based user management methods. An external authorization mixin system with separate AccessControl state was not requested and adds significant unspecified complexity.
